message:
fix(charmed_log): handle RwLock poisoning gracefully (bd-1bja)

Replace all RwLock .unwrap() with .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
pattern to recover from lock poisoning instead of panicking.

This prevents cascading panics when a thread panics while holding the
logger's internal lock. Logging operations will continue functioning
even if the lock was previously poisoned.

Affected operations:
- Debug impl
- set_level/level, set_prefix/prefix
- set_report_timestamp, set_report_caller
- set_time_format, set_formatter, set_styles
- with_fields (read), log (read+write)

Note: Also includes error_handler feature from concurrent work.

Closes bd-1bja, unblocks bd-2go9 (backtrace overhead documentation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
